migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_tank (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, tank_code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, level_pct INTEGER NOT NULL); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_dispatch_order (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, order_no VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, tank_code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, volume_liters INTEGER NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL); INSERT INTO mes_tank (id, tank_code, level_pct) SELECT 'aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa', 'T-01', 72 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_tank WHERE tank_code = 'T-01'); INSERT INTO mes_dispatch_order (id, order_no, tank_code, volume_liters, status) SELECT 'bbbbbbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbbbbbbbbbb', 'DO-1001', 'T-01', 12000, 'pending' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_dispatch_order WHERE order_no = 'DO-1001'); INSERT INTO mes_dispatch_order (id, order_no, tank_code, volume_liters, status) SELECT 'cccccccc-cccc-cccc-cccc-cccccccccccc', 'DO-1002', 'T-01', 8000, 'pending' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_dispatch_order WHERE order_no = 'DO-1002');

objects.name: mes-rack-01
objects.description: Simplified loading rack (эстакада) for MES reference

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"orders","sql":"SELECT order_no, tank_code, volume_liters, status FROM mes_dispatch_order ORDER BY order_no"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${orders}","fields":{"orderNo":"${item.order_no}","tankCode":"${item.tank_code}","volumeLiters":"${item.volume_liters}","status":"${item.status}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"order","sql":"SELECT id, status FROM mes_dispatch_order WHERE order_no = ?","params":["${input.orderNo}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"order","message":"Order not found"},{"type":"failIfNotEquals","var":"order.status","equals":"pending","message":"Order is not pending"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_dispatch_order SET status = 'filling' WHERE order_no = ?","params":["${input.orderNo}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","status":"filling"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"order","sql":"SELECT id, status FROM mes_dispatch_order WHERE order_no = ?","params":["${input.orderNo}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"order","message":"Order not found"},{"type":"failIfNotEquals","var":"order.status","equals":"filling","message":"Order is not filling"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_dispatch_order SET status = 'completed' WHERE order_no = ?","params":["${input.orderNo}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","status":"completed"}}]}

correlators.name: MES latch alarm on rack over-temp
